files.content:
"use client"

import * as React from "react"

export const useIsomorphicLayoutEffect =
  typeof window !== "undefined" ? React.useLayoutEffect : React.useEffect

"use client"

import * as React from "react"

export const useIsomorphicLayoutEffect =
  typeof window !== "undefined" ? React.useLayoutEffect : React.useEffect

_meta.author: strlrd-29
_meta.title: useIsomorphicLayoutEffect
_meta.description: Custom hook that uses either useLayoutEffect or useEffect based on the environment (client-side or server-side).
